summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that EOG is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $135.85. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 52.6%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $142.17 and a significant trendline confluence around $140.26 (formed by 7 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
